name: Performance Optimization
description: Improve FPS on a heavy scene. Success: FPS improvement of at least 10% (reuses V3 verification perf-delta check).

tasks.name: Optimize FPS on a heavy scene
tasks.prompt: The scene in src/main.js is render-heavy with low FPS. Call triangle_performance_snapshot and triangle_describe_scene to understand the current bottleneck. Propose and apply the single highest-impact optimization (e.g. instancing, draw-call merging, LOD, material simplification, frustum culling). Then call triangle_performance_snapshot again to confirm the improvement. Summarise the before/after metrics.
tasks.setup: A project with a heavy scene in src/main.js (many draw calls, duplicated geometry, no LOD).

successCriteria.description: FPS improvement of at least 10% after the optimization is applied (enforced by the V3 perf-delta verification check).
